response.step_by_step_log: The video opens with a host providing concert instructions (00:00 - 02:49). At 02:49, a musical performance begins. The screen displays the concert title 'Drawn to Dawn', but a specific song title and artist were not provided on-screen. I searched for 'Drawn to Dawn' and determined it is the concert title featuring Hololive talents (Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis), not the title of the song being performed. Therefore, lyrics could not be found.
response.global_summary: The video is an introduction and performance segment from the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert featuring Hololive talents. The first segment consists of a VTuber host providing safety and performance guidelines to the audience, followed by a musical performance.

scenes.description: A VTuber host talks to the audience on a stage, providing concert safety and performance guidelines. The screen behind displays the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert logo.
A musical performance begins in the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. The screen displays the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert logo.
